text:
This variable indicates if the beneficiary was enrolled in an employer-sponsored prescription drug plan 
that qualified for Part D’s retiree drug subsidy (RDS) for a given month (January through December). 

SHORT NAME: 
 RDSIND01 
RDSIND02 
RDSIND03 
RDSIND04 
RDSIND05 
RDSIND06 
 RDSIND07 
RDSIND08 
RDSIND09 
RDSIND10 
RDSIND11 
RDSIND12 
LONG NAME: 
 RDS_IND_01 
RDS_IND_02 
RDS_IND_03 
RDS_IND_04 
RDS_IND_05 
RDS_IND_06 
 RDS_IND_07 
RDS_IND_08 
RDS_IND_09 
RDS_IND_10 
RDS_IND_11 
RDS_IND_12
